title: Promotion of switching to a business account from personal
summaryBody: Maximise the value of our bank partnerships and enhance customer success by moving self-employed customers from mixed-use personal accounts to dedicated business accounts.
detailBody: Maximise the value of our bank partnerships and enhance customer success by moving self-employed customers from mixed-use personal accounts to dedicated business accounts.
